title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 19 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 19 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 19 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/02/2025
Today, iron ore fluctuated upward. The most-traded contract I2505 finally closed at 820.5, up 1.48% throughout the day.Traders sold goods based on market trends, while steel mills purchased as needed. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
